title: Question: make program fault with MinGW on v4.006
body:
--- Author Name: **HyungKi Jeong** Original Redmine Message: 2713 from https://www.veripool.org --- In MinGW64 + MSYS(windows) system.
Program fault is occurred at "verilated_fst_c.cpp" at line #74, on v4.006

``` 74: m_fst = fstWriterCreate(filename, 1); ```
So I reverted this line to old one.
``` 74: m_fst = fstWriterCreate(filename, 0); ```
Actually I don't know why this is happened.
But now program fault is gone.:) ???
